name: Shahi Korma
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs boned lamb or beef (1-inch cubes)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine garlic, ginger, almonds, and water. Blend until smooth.
2. Heat oil in a large, heavy pot or wok over medium-high heat. When hot, add meat pieces so they lie in a single layer without overcrowding. Brown the meat on all sides using a slotted spoon, then transfer to a bowl.
3. Brown all meat this way.
4. Add cardamom, cloves, and cinnamon to the hot oil. Stir; cloves will puff up immediately.
5. Add onions and fry until browned.
6. Turn heat down to medium. Add paste from blender along with coriander, cumin, and cayenne. Stir and fry for 3-4 minutes or until slightly browned.
7. Return meat cubes and any accumulated liquid from the bowl, salt, heavy cream, and additional broth (or more water for beef) to the pot. Bring mixture to a boil.
8. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer lamb for 1 hour and beef for 2 hours, stirring frequently during cooking period. Skim off any foam that rises to the surface.
9. Sprinkle in garam masala and mix before serving.
